description: Style Note ganuchi gives you a high fashion shoe with this pair. Wear it for that stylish touch to your outfit and give your entire look a classy addition with this pair. Product Details Round toed brown slip on shoes with stitched detail Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Elasticated insets on the sides of the tongue Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole only at the forefoot and heel region, lugs at the forefoot region and textured at the heel region Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine
